title: Alex's Exotic Armory
description: Adds over 50 new items and crafting recipe  like Moonstone Tools or Obsidian Armor as well as new ores!
body:
##  Exotic Armory got new gear with special benefits.
- **Brittlestone Armor** + Tools    _~ Weak Stone Armor with Resistance_ 
  
- **Ruby Armor +Tools**    _~ Diamond-like armory with better enchantability_
- **Rabbit Hide Armor**    _~ Weak Armor with Jump Boost_
- **Obsidian Armor**    _~ Strong Armor with Fire Resistance and Resistance_
- **Amethyst Armor + Haste Tools**    _~ Nightvison Armor and Haste Tools_
- **Moonstone Armor + Tools**    _~ Rare Ore, better than Diamond but only spawns at 128+_
- **Emerald Armor + Lucky Tools**    _~ Good Armor with Luck Tools_
- **Bamboo Armor**    _~ Simple Armor fitting for the jungle_
- **Rotten Flesh Armor**  _~ Weak Armor with Invisibility_
- **Melon Armor** _~ Weak Armor with infinite Saturation_
##

![The Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XLYPBkyG/images/ab6eee1c1eb683178002e240da21e1b6f8374ee0.png)
![The Moonstone Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XLYPBkyG/images/42e8213e490b93f5b32819ca90b43321eb8979ba.png)
##
Download now and start crafting your legendary equipment!
##
